channel.title: Spritpreise on Staudi Apps & Games
channel.description: Recent content in Spritpreise on Staudi Apps & Games

item.title: Spritpreise - An update to the colors on the gas station map
item.description:
A recent update has fundamentally changed how the map displays gas station markers (green, yellow, red). Here is a brief explanation of the background.

What has changed? Link to heading

Previously, the color sorting was always based on the lowest price within a wide radius of 25 kilometers. With the new update, this radius has been significantly reduced to 7.5 kilometers.

item.title: Spritpreise - Preisfarben passen sich nun der Karte an
item.description:
Mit einem kürzlich veröffentlichten Update wurde das Verhalten der Kartendarstellung bezüglich der farblichen Tankstellen-Markierungen (Grün, Gelb, Rot) grundlegend angepasst. Hier werden kurz die Hintergrund erläutert.

Was hat sich geändert? Link to heading

Bisher wurde für die farbliche Einsortierung stets der günstigste Preis innerhalb eines weiten Umkreises von 25 Kilometern als Referenz herangezogen. Mit dem neuen Update wurde dieser Radius deutlich auf 7,5 Kilometer verkleinert.

item.title: Handelsblatt awards spritpreise.jetzt as best online portal
item.description:
Spritpreise.jetzt was awarded best online portal of 2025 in the fuel cost comparison category by Handelsblatt, a leading German newspaper focusing on business and finance.

This makes me incredibly proud, as it shows that the mission to make the fuel market more transparent is hitting the mark. Handelsblatt put the portals through their paces - from user-friendliness to added value for users.

You can read the entire Handelsblatt article here:
https://www.handelsblatt.com/unternehmen/dienstleister/ranking-das-sind-die-besten-online-portale-des-jahres-2025/100147184.html

item.title: Recognize how stable a fuel price is
item.description:
We’re all familiar with this moment: you discover an unbeatably low gas price, start the engine and set off. But when you arrive at the gas station, you’re disappointed: the price has just changed - upwards, of course.

To minimize these annoying surprises, we have upgraded our app with a new, crucial data point.

item.title: Focus Money awards spritpreise.jetzt
item.description:
We are delighted to announce that spritpreise.jetzt has received an award in the current issue of Focus Money magazine (issue 30/2025)!

In the comprehensive study “Best Online Portals”, which was carried out by the analysis and consulting institute Service Value on behalf of Focus Money, users gave us a top rating in the “Fuel Cost Comparison” category.

This award means a great deal to us, as it is based directly on the opinions of over 94,000 consumers. Only portals that perform better than the overall average of all providers assessed within their sector receive a “top score” award.

item.title: Spritpreise: Implementing a price alarm backend
item.description:
Spritpreise has recently a Price Alarm feature, that sends push notifications based on a personal price threshold. In this blog post, I’ll explain some of the technical details and considerations that went into the implementation.

The API

The price alarm is handled by a new application and API that I have implemented based on the Spring Boot / Kotlin stack. It uses a database to store the configured price alarms, stations as well as the Firebase Cloud Messaging push token.

item.title: Spritpreise: Price alarm now available
item.description:
Spritpreise has received a useful new feature – the Price Alarm! Starting now, you can set a personal price threshold for your favorite gas stations. If the price for Super E5, E10, or Diesel drops below this value, you’ll automatically receive a push notification directly to your smartphone.

You’re on vacation or have recently filled up? No worries, pause the price alarm with one simple click for a few hours or days - until you need it again.
